description: Your small family practice has acquired an in-house HbA1c analyzer. A comprehensive lab order request document at /home/ga/Desktop/lab_order_request.txt contains procedure configuration details, patient information, test results to enter, and clinical follow-up actions. Configure the HbA1c test procedure hierarchy in the EHR, then process the specified patient's lab order with an encounter and result entry, and complete the clinical care cycle by adding the indicated diagnosis, writing the prescribed medication, and scheduling the follow-up appointment — all per the document's instructions. Login with admin / password.

metadata.occupation: Clinician-Administrator at a small family practice
